name: Tinta Wine
tagline: Multilingual wine culture website with headless CMS and SEO
description: Tinta Wine is a multilingual website for a wine culture business offering agency services, academy courses, software solutions, and editorial content. Built with PayloadCMS as a headless CMS, it features a block-based content editor, dynamic forms, SEO optimization, and a blog with versioning and live preview.
highlights: Headless CMS with PayloadCMS 3.7 and Lexical rich text editor
Block-based page builder with 8+ reusable content blocks
SEO-optimized with auto-generated sitemaps and meta management
Blog with versioning, drafts, live preview, and multi-author support
aiDetails: Built with Cursor (.cursorrules present) and Claude Code (CLAUDE.md present)
